_meta.description: Cache-reset cadence monitor, one doc per frozen-reset firing (ADR-0092 §D7, FRE-572). actual_turns = turns elapsed since last reset; l_star = ADR-0081 computed optimum L* (null when optimal_run_length=inf, i.e. no hold-cost pressure); deviation_turns = actual_turns - l_star (positive = reset too late, negative = too early; null when l_star is null). backend keyword allows per-backend aggregation (llamacpp vs mlx asymmetry). dynamic:false — explicit double for l_star/deviation_turns guards the first-value-0.0-to-long dynamic-mapping trap. Index pattern agent-monitors-cache-reset-cadence-YYYY-MM-DD.
